pageContext.name: Sahaqiel: In the Great Expanse
pageContext.description: Sideshow presents the Sahaqiel: In The Great Expanse Fine Art Print, an ethereal original fantasy artwork by Peter Mohrbacher.  From the mind of Peter Mohrbacher, the Angelarium project has grown into an artistic anthology of designs inspired by numerous named angels throughout mythology. The Sahaqiel: In The Great Expanse Fine Art Print shows a Seraphim, one of the heavenly manifestations of earthly beliefs, drifting among the darkening dusk clouds. This scholar observes the world, their all-seeing gaze a discerning, pearlescent orb floating freely in their mind. Ribbons emerge like wings from their back, aiding flight yet also restraining. This is Sahaqiel, Angel of the Sky, shielding humanity from the burn of divinity.  This illustrious illustration is now being offered to fans in a high-end, museum quality print format for the first time in collaboration with Sideshow Art Prints. Each Sahaqiel: In The Great Expanse Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Angelarium logo in the margin as part of the limited edition of 250 pieces. Available as an unframed giclée and in a custom framed presentation, this resplendent fantasy artwork makes a truly unique addition to any collection, especially alongside other Angelarium art prints.  Bring radiance to your life today with the Sahaqiel: In The Great Expanse Fine Art Print by Peter Mohrbacher.
